_comment: Rooms whose audio ALSO plays on their ESP32-S3 node box (additive beside the WS unit path — see node_audio_manager.py). server_host = this server's LAN address, where nodes stream GET /api/audio/<file> from. Per room: host/port = the node's ESPHome native API; node = basename for the generated firmware cue package (sim/esphome/audio/cues-<node>.yaml); effects = whose audio files get compiled into that node (sim/esphome/make_node_audio.py). Currently mapped: the S3 bench node only — add real rooms as their boxes are built.
